title: Aurora 12745 8-inch Flopsie Fox, Multicolor
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora 8-inch Flopsie Fox Foxxie is part of our Mini Flopsies collection. Foxxie and his friends have all been lovingly made by Aurora to ensure that they will last for years. Whether you are buying for a child or an adult, they will be thrilled with Foxxie the Fox. Foxxie the 8" Mini Flopsie Fox is lovingly crafted with a soft, fluffy coat that is perfect for years of hugs and cuddles. With a bean filled floppy body, this Mini Flopsie is a great cuddle buddy and even better friend. Top quality materials are used to ensure durability and softness.
